latePolicy.title: Late Payment Policy
latePolicy.description: A late fee of ₹100 per day will be charged after the due date. After 15 days, students may not be permitted to attend classes until outstanding fees are cleared.

methods.description: Direct bank transfer to school account

instructions.title: Secure Online Payment Instructions
steps: Visit our school portal and login to your account
Select the term and verify the amount due
Download and save the payment receipt

scholarships.title: Scholarships & Financial Aid
scholarships.description: Financial support options for deserving students

scholarships.name: Sibling Discount
scholarships.criteria: For second child from same family

needBased.title: Need-Based Financial Assistance
needBased.description: We offer limited need-based financial assistance for economically challenged families with academically outstanding students. Applications are reviewed confidentially on a case-by-case basis.

items.question: What is included in the tuition fee?
items.answer: Tuition fee covers regular academic instruction, use of laboratory facilities, library access, and basic stationery. It does not include transportation, meals, uniforms, or special activities.

items.question: Are there any hidden charges?
items.answer: No, all fees are clearly communicated upfront. Additional charges only apply for optional services like transportation, meals, and specific extracurricular activities that parents choose to enroll their children in.

items.question: What is the development fee used for?
items.answer: The development fee is used for infrastructure maintenance, technology upgrades, facility improvements, and campus development projects that benefit all students.

items.question: Can fees be paid in installments?
items.answer: Yes, we offer quarterly payment options. The annual fee is divided into three terms with due dates in April, August, and December.

items.question: What is the policy for late fee payment?
items.answer: A late fee of ₹100 per day is applicable after the due date. After 15 days, students may not be permitted to attend classes until fees are cleared.

items.question: Are fees refundable if a student withdraws?
items.answer: Tuition fees are refundable on a pro-rata basis. Development and annual charges are non-refundable once the academic term has begun.

info.content: Saturday: 9:00 AM - 12:00 PM (Fee related queries only)
